description: Use this API routine to factorize the sequence matrices in preparation for unbalanced fault calculations SCMU and SPCB. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = seqd_2(options)

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying options to be used in constructing the sequence matrices. (input).

options.description: dc line and FACTS device option (0 by default).
transformer impedance correction option (1 by default).
do not apply to zero sequence.
fault analysis generator reactance option; ignored if generators are already “converted” (0 by default).

error_codes.description: fault analysis is invalid due to the presence of in-service induction machines that are in the “stalled” or “tripped” state.
bus type code and series element status inconsistencies.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
